vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF for preparing PR #441 (deft-glossary skill) for merge

plan.title: feat(skills): prepare PR #441 deft-glossary for merge -- rename to deft-directive-glossary + .agents stub + AGENTS.md routing + CHANGELOG + rebase

narratives.Description: PR #441 (feat(skills): add deft-glossary skill) is 22 days old, MERGEABLE + green CI but BEHIND master and violates four merge-bar contracts surfaced by Greptile review and by the current test suite. This scope covers the maintainer-side fixups needed to land the skill cleanly.
narratives.Origin: Maintainer-driven from PR review of https://github.com/deftai/directive/pull/441 (no underlying issue; PR is the canonical artifact).
narratives.Problem: PR #441 introduces skills/deft-glossary/SKILL.md (+113 lines) but: (1) directory name lacks the canonical deft-directive-* prefix and trips tests/content/test_vbrief_model.py::test_skills_dir_only_deft_directive_prefixed; (2) missing companion .agents/skills/deft-directive-glossary/SKILL.md thin-pointer stub that every other skill carries; (3) missing AGENTS.md Skill Routing entry (Greptile P1); (4) missing CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] entry (Greptile P2 + AGENTS.md pre-commit checklist). Branch sits ~v0.19.0-era; master is post-v0.27.1.
narratives.Acceptance: (1) skills/deft-glossary renamed to skills/deft-directive-glossary via git mv preserving the +113-line body verbatim. (2) New .agents/skills/deft-directive-glossary/SKILL.md thin-pointer stub modelled on .agents/skills/deft-directive-gh-triage/SKILL.md. (3) AGENTS.md Skill Routing section gains one new entry mapping 'glossary' / 'ubiquitous language' / 'domain model' / 'DDD' / 'define terms' to skills/deft-directive-glossary/SKILL.md. (4) CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] ### Added gains a new bullet referencing (#441). (5) Branch rebased onto origin/master with clean push. (6) task check passes. (7) Greptile P1 + P2 findings clear on re-trigger. (8) GitHub mergeStateStatus flips from BEHIND.
narratives.OutOfScope: Actual merge button click (maintainer/user responsibility). Edits to the body of skills/deft-directive-glossary/SKILL.md beyond the path rename. Touching core/glossary.md or UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md infrastructure (the skill writes those at runtime; no scaffolding belongs in this PR). Re-authoring the PR under a maintainer's account (external contributor visionik keeps authorship; commit message credits the rename).
narratives.Files: vbrief/proposed/ -> pending/ -> active/ (this file lifecycle); skills/deft-glossary/SKILL.md (renamed via git mv); skills/deft-directive-glossary/SKILL.md (renamed-to target); .agents/skills/deft-directive-glossary/SKILL.md (NEW thin-pointer stub); AGENTS.md (one new Skill Routing line); CHANGELOG.md (one new [Unreleased] -> Added bullet).

items.title: Promote scope vBRIEF to pending -> active and set status=running so #810 preflight gate clears
Checkout feat/skill-deft-glossary and rebase onto origin/master (or merge-from-master fallback)
Add AGENTS.md Skill Routing entry for glossary triggers -> skills/deft-directive-glossary/SKILL.md
task check passes locally (lint + tests + verify:encoding)
Commit + push with --force-with-lease (rebase) or regular push (merge)
Re-trigger Greptile + confirm P1/P2 findings cleared + CI green + mergeStateStatus no longer BEHIND
Move scope vBRIEF active/ -> completed/ via task scope:complete after PR merges (deferred close-out)

references.title: Issue #401: DDD framework work (referenced by PR #441 body)
Issue #411: v0.19 -> v0.20 skill rename arc (deft-* -> deft-directive-*)
Issue #810: Implementation Intent Gate (preflight requirement satisfied by this vBRIEF)

x-tracking.greptile_findings: 1xP1 (missing AGENTS.md routing entry), 1xP2 (missing CHANGELOG entry); cleared by acceptance items 5 + 6
